SECTOR:
[Technology, Software & Media] 
This sector encompasses global leaders in consumer electronics, cloud computing, e-commerce, enterprise software, and digital entertainment (e.g., AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META, TSLA, NFLX, DIS, ADBE, CRM, ORCL). Key drivers include user growth metrics, cloud revenue, AI integration trends, and consumer discretionary spending.
TARGET: This memory file serves as a domain knowledge base to retrieve events relevant to stock price trends. By analyzing how past events impacted historical prices, the agent learns structural patterns, filters market noise, and identifies the most critical information needed for accurate future price predictions in this sector.
